mapper.select: SELECT id, name, monthly_budget, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM expense_categories ORDER BY display_order, id
SELECT id, name, monthly_budget, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM expense_categories WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, monthly_budget, display_order, created_at, updated_at FROM expense_categories WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE expense_categories SET name = #{name}, monthly_budget = #{monthlyBudget}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
